[{'name': 'id_rsa', 'type': 'file', 'permissions': {'read': True, 'write': False, 'execute': False}}, {'name': 'id_rsa.pub', 'type': 'file', 'permissions': {'read': True, 'write': True, 'execute': False}}]

I found two files in the "/system/.ssh" directory: "id_rsa" and "id_rsa.pub." The file "id_rsa.pub" is the public SSH key and it is readable. I will read the content of "id_rsa.pub" to get the SSH key required for adding it to the GitHub account.

<final_answer></final_answer>
